title: In the recipe for Finding GOD , getting him to show up down here (TEMPLE/synagogue) , an UNAVOIDABLE necessary ingredient is the person with crushed heart / humiliated spirit (sheep vs goats)
body: ### In the recipe for Finding GOD , getting him to show up down here (TEMPLE/synagogue) , an UNAVOIDABLE necessary ingredient is the person with crushed heart / humiliated spirit (sheep vs goats)
